You said:

this is the logo of their business i want to design website with this colour combo of the logo and these so get the colour palatte for for the entire website give me the colour palatte

ChatGPT said:

Your logo already gives a strong, premium color direction — mainly royal blue + gold + white. I’ll extract a clean, professional website-ready color palette from it and extend it so you can design a full UI (buttons, backgrounds, text, etc.).

🎨 Core Brand Colors (From Logo)

  • Primary Blue → #1E3A8A
    (Deep royal blue – trust, education, professionalism)

  • Secondary Blue → #2563EB
    (Slightly brighter blue for hover states & accents)

  • Gold → #C9A54C
    (Luxury, global, premium feel)

  • Dark Gold → #A67C2E
    (Used for headings / hover / borders)

🎨 Neutral & Supporting Colors

  • White → #FFFFFF
    (Main background)

  • Light Gray → #F5F7FA
    (Section backgrounds)

  • Medium Gray → #6B7280
    (Secondary text)

  • Dark Text (Almost Black) → #111827
    (Primary text)

🎨 Accent Colors (Optional but Useful)

These help your UI feel modern and not too flat:

  • Soft Gold Tint → #F4E7C1
    (Background highlight sections)

  • Light Blue Tint → #DBEAFE
    (Cards / hover backgrounds)

🧩 How to Use in Your Website

🔹 Header / Navbar

  • Background: #FFFFFF

  • Logo + Brand: Blue + Gold

  • Menu text: #1E3A8A

  • Hover: #2563EB

🔹 Hero Section

  • Background: gradient
    👉 linear-gradient(135deg, #1E3A8A, #2563EB)

  • Text: #FFFFFF

  • CTA Button:

    • Background: #C9A54C

    • Hover: #A67C2E

🔹 Buttons

  • Primary Button:

    • BG: #C9A54C

    • Text: #FFFFFF

  • Secondary Button:

    • Border: #1E3A8A

    • Text: #1E3A8A

    • Hover: #1E3A8A + white text

🔹 Cards / Sections

  • Background: #FFFFFF

  • Alternate Section: #F5F7FA

  • Borders: #E5E7EB

🔹 Footer

  • Background: #1E3A8A

  • Text: #FFFFFF

  • Links: #C9A54C

💡 Design Style Recommendation (Important)

Your logo feels:

  • Premium 🎓

  • Global 🌍

  • Educational 📘

So your UI should be:

  • Clean (not cluttered)

  • Slight gradients (modern look)

  • Soft shadows

  • Rounded corners (8px–12px)

🎯 Ready-to-Use Tailwind Palette (if you're using Tailwind)

JavaScript
colors: {
  primary: "#1E3A8A",
  secondary: "#2563EB",
  gold: "#C9A54C",
  goldDark: "#A67C2E",
  light: "#F5F7FA",
  textDark: "#111827",
  textLight: "#6B7280"
}

If you want next step, I can:

  • 🎨 Design full homepage UI structure

  • 💻 Give React + Tailwind code

  • ✨ Suggest animations + modern layout

Just tell 👍


You said:

give me a prompt

ChatGPT said:

Got it — you want a ready-to-use prompt to generate your full website design (UI + colors) based on your logo. Here’s a strong, professional prompt you can use in tools like ChatGPT, Figma AI, v0.dev, or any UI generator:

🚀 WEBSITE DESIGN PROMPT

Design a modern, premium, and professional Study Abroad Consultancy website for a brand named "Wiseway Overseas".

Use a color palette inspired by the logo:
- Primary Color: Deep Royal Blue (#1E3A8A)
- Secondary Color: Bright Blue (#2563EB)
- Accent Color: Gold (#C9A54C)
- Dark Gold: (#A67C2E)
- Background: White (#FFFFFF) and Light Gray (#F5F7FA)

Design Style:
- Clean, minimal, and premium look
- Soft shadows and rounded corners (8px–12px)
- Smooth gradients (blue gradient backgrounds)
- Elegant typography (modern sans-serif + slight serif for headings if needed)
- High-end, global education brand feel

Create the following sections:

1. Hero Section
- Full-width gradient background (blue tones)
- Headline: "Your Wiseway to Global Education"
- Subtext about studying abroad
- CTA button in gold ("Get Free Consultation")

2. Navigation Bar
- White background
- Logo on left
- Menu on right (Home, About, Services, Countries, Contact)

3. Services Section
- Cards with icons (Visa, Admissions, Coaching, Counseling)
- Hover effects using blue/gold

4. Countries Section
- Grid of popular countries (USA, UK, Canada, Australia)
- Use clean cards with images

5. Why Choose Us
- Bullet points or icons
- Highlight trust, success rate, global reach

6. Testimonials
- Student reviews in card layout

7. Call to Action Section
- Gold background or blue gradient
- Strong CTA

8. Footer
- Dark blue background
- White text
- Gold highlights for links

UI Requirements:
- Consistent spacing and alignment
- Responsive design (mobile + desktop)
- Use gold only for highlights and CTA (not overuse)
- Use blue as dominant color
- Maintain strong visual hierarchy

Output:
- Provide complete UI layout structure
- Include color usage per section
- Include button styles, typography, and spacing system

🔥 If You Want Even Better Results

Use this add-on line at the end of the prompt:

Generate this as a React + Tailwind CSS frontend with clean reusable components and modern UI design.

If you want, I can next:

  • Convert this into actual React code (ready to run)

  • Or design a full Figma-style layout breakdown

  • Or give you exact homepage wireframe + sections UI

Just tell 👍

ChatGPT said:

Good — your current prompt is already strong, but it’s still generic “inspired by logo”.
You want STRICT logo-based branding (exact colors, not approximations). That requires tightening the prompt.

Here’s your modified, production-level prompt 👇

🚀 FINAL MODIFIED PROMPT (STRICT BRAND COLOR CONTROL)

Writing

Design a completely redesigned, modern, premium Study Abroad Consultancy website for the brand "Wiseway Overseas".

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
Use ONLY the exact color palette derived from the provided logo.
Do NOT introduce new colors. Maintain strict brand consistency across the entire UI.

🎨 Exact Brand Colors (STRICT USAGE):

  • Primary Blue (Logo Globe): #1E3A8A

  • Deep Blue (Book/Shadow): #0F2A66

  • Secondary Blue: #2563EB

  • Gold (Main Logo Text & Plane): #C9A54C

  • Dark Gold (Hover/Depth): #A67C2E

  • Light Gold Tint (Background highlight only): #F4E7C1

  • White: #FFFFFF

  • Light Neutral Background: #F5F7FA

  • Dark Text: #111827

❌ Do NOT use random blacks, different yellows, or off-brand blues.
❌ Avoid gradients using colors outside this palette.

🎯 DESIGN GOAL:
Transform the existing UI into a luxury, global, high-trust brand experience similar to premium international education platforms.

🧩 DESIGN STYLE:

  • Clean, minimal, high-end layout

  • Premium spacing (more whitespace, less clutter)

  • Soft shadows + rounded corners (10px–12px)

  • Subtle blue gradients ONLY using (#1E3A8A → #2563EB)

  • Gold used ONLY for CTA, highlights, and important accents

  • Typography: Modern sans-serif (Poppins/Inter) + optional serif for headings

🧱 KEEP CONTENT SAME:
⚠️ Do NOT change text content. Only redesign UI, layout, and styling.

📐 SECTION-WISE DESIGN INSTRUCTIONS:

  1. HERO SECTION (HIGH IMPACT)

  • Background: Gradient (#1E3A8A → #2563EB)

  • Headline: White (#FFFFFF)

  • Highlight important words using Gold (#C9A54C)

  • CTA Button:

    • Background: Gold (#C9A54C)

    • Hover: Dark Gold (#A67C2E)

  • Secondary Button:

    • Outline style with white border

  • Add subtle overlay/glow using light blue tint

  1. NAVBAR

  • Background: White (#FFFFFF)

  • Text: Primary Blue (#1E3A8A)

  • Hover: Secondary Blue (#2563EB)

  • CTA Button: Gold (#C9A54C)

  • Sticky + slight shadow

  1. SERVICES SECTION

  • Background: Light Gray (#F5F7FA)

  • Cards:

    • Background: White

    • Border: very light gray

    • Hover:

      • Border becomes Blue (#2563EB)

      • Icon changes to Gold (#C9A54C)

  1. COUNTRIES SECTION

  • Clean card grid

  • Card hover:

    • slight zoom + blue shadow

  • Titles: Dark text (#111827)

  • Accent underline in Gold

  1. WHY CHOOSE US

  • Icons in Gold

  • Titles in Blue (#1E3A8A)

  • Background: White

  1. TESTIMONIALS

  • Card background: White

  • Quote icon: Gold

  • Subtle blue shadow

  1. CTA SECTION (CONVERSION FOCUS)
    Option A:

  • Background: Gold (#C9A54C)

  • Text: White

Option B:

  • Background: Blue Gradient

  • Button: Gold

  1. FOOTER

  • Background: Deep Blue (#0F2A66)

  • Text: White

  • Links hover: Gold (#C9A54C)

🎛️ UI SYSTEM:

Buttons:

  • Primary → Gold background, white text

  • Secondary → Blue border, blue text

Spacing:

  • Section padding: 80px–120px

  • Card padding: 20px–24px

Shadows:

  • Soft, subtle (no harsh shadows)

📱 RESPONSIVENESS:

  • Fully responsive (mobile-first)

  • Stack sections cleanly

  • Maintain spacing consistency

📦 OUTPUT REQUIRED:

  • Complete UI layout structure

  • Exact color usage per component

  • Button styles

  • Typography system

  • Spacing system

  • Component breakdown (Navbar, Hero, Cards, Footer)

💡 FINAL NOTE:
The design must feel like a premium international brand, not a template.
Consistency of blue + gold is critical. Avoid visual noise.

🔥 Why this version is better

  • Forces exact logo colors (no deviation)

  • Removes “AI creativity mistakes” (random colors)

  • Adds luxury feel (very important for consultancy brand)

  • Keeps your existing content intact

  • Gives developer-ready clarity

If you want next step, I can:

  • Convert this into actual React + Tailwind code (full website)

  • Or redesign your current UI screenshot into premium layout upgrade

Just tell 👍

🎨 🎯 TOTAL COLORS IN YOUR LOGO: 7

🔵 1. Primary Royal Blue (Globe)

  • Hex: #1E3A8A

  • Usage: Main globe, brand identity

🔵 2. Deep Navy Blue (Book Base / Shadows)

  • Hex: #0F2A66

  • Usage: Book icon, depth, darker accents

🔵 3. Medium Blue (Highlights)

  • Hex: #2563EB

  • Usage: Light reflections on globe

🟡 4. Gold (Main Accent)

  • Hex: #C9A54C

  • Usage: Plane, text “WISEWAY OVERSEAS”

🟤 5. Dark Gold (Shadow / Depth)

  • Hex: #A67C2E

  • Usage: Gold shading, premium effect

🤍 6. White

  • Hex: #FFFFFF

  • Usage: Background

⚪ 7. Light Neutral Gray

  • Hex: #F5F7FA

  • Usage: Background tone (very subtle)

🎯 FINAL PALETTE (COPY-PASTE READY)

CSS
Primary Blue:   #1E3A8A
Deep Blue:      #0F2A66
Secondary Blue: #2563EB
Gold:           #C9A54C
Dark Gold:      #A67C2E
White:          #FFFFFF
Light Gray:     #F5F7FA

💡 IMPORTANT DESIGN TIP

  • Blue = 70% usage (dominant color)

  • White/Gray = 20% (background)

  • Gold = 10% (only highlights & buttons) ⚠️

👉 This is what makes your brand look premium instead of cheap

ChatGPT said:

You’re basically asking for a complete blue + gold + white palette system (not just logo colors, but usable shades for UI). Good move — this is what makes a site look premium instead of basic.

Here’s a proper extended palette built around your logo 👇

🎨 BLUE + GOLD + WHITE PALETTE (FULL SYSTEM)

🔵 Primary Blues (Brand Core)

6

  • Primary Blue → #1E3A8A (main brand)

  • Deep Navy → #0F2A66 (footer, strong sections)

  • Secondary Blue → #2563EB (hover, accents)

  • Light Blue → #DBEAFE (background tint)

🟡 Gold Shades (Premium Feel)

6

  • Primary Gold → #C9A54C (CTA buttons)

  • Dark Gold → #A67C2E (hover states)

  • Soft Gold → #F4E7C1 (background highlights)

  • Light Gold Glow → #FAF3DD (subtle UI sections)

⚪ White & Neutral System (Clean UI)

5

  • Pure White → #FFFFFF (main background)

  • Light Gray → #F5F7FA (section background)

  • Border Gray → #E5E7EB (cards/borders)

  • Text Dark → #111827 (headings)

  • Text Light → #6B7280 (paragraphs)

🎯 READY-TO-USE FINAL PALETTE

CSS
Primary Blue:   #1E3A8A
Deep Blue:      #0F2A66
Secondary Blue: #2563EB
Light Blue:     #DBEAFE

Gold:           #C9A54C
Dark Gold:      #A67C2E
Soft Gold:      #F4E7C1
Light Gold:     #FAF3DD

White:          #FFFFFF
Light Gray:     #F5F7FA
Border Gray:    #E5E7EB
Text Dark:      #111827
Text Light:     #6B7280

💡 HOW TO USE (VERY IMPORTANT)

  • 🔵 Blue → Main branding (headers, footer, hero)

  • 🟡 Gold → ONLY buttons, highlights, icons

  • ⚪ White/Gray → Background & spacing

👉 Rule:

If you overuse gold → looks cheap
If you balance it → looks premium

🔥 PRO TIP (What most people miss)

Use gradient like this in hero:

CSS
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1E3A8A, #2563EB);

This instantly makes your site look modern + high-end

You said:

i want different images according to the to text the images want different images according to the text ie me prompt i will give to antigravity

ChatGPT said:

Got it — you want a prompt that generates relevant images based on each section’s text (not random stock images). This is exactly how you make your site look premium and meaningful.

Here’s a high-quality prompt you can give to Antigravity / AI image generator 👇

🚀 MASTER IMAGE GENERATION PROMPT

Writing

Generate high-quality, modern, professional website images for a Study Abroad Consultancy brand "Wiseway Overseas".

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
Each image MUST directly match the section text and context.
Do NOT generate generic or random images.
Images should feel premium, realistic, and globally relevant.

🎨 STYLE GUIDELINES:

  • Clean, modern, professional

  • Natural lighting, soft shadows

  • Slight blue + gold tone overlay (brand consistency)

  • Realistic photography style (not cartoonish)

  • High resolution (website hero quality)

  • Diverse students (international representation)

📌 SECTION-WISE IMAGE REQUIREMENTS:

  1. HERO SECTION IMAGE
    Prompt:
    "Aspiring international student looking at world map or globe, dreaming of studying abroad, modern workspace, laptop, soft blue and gold lighting, global education concept, premium and inspiring mood"

  1. SERVICES (4 IMAGES)

a) Visa Assistance:
"Student consulting with advisor about visa documents, professional office environment, paperwork and passport visible"

b) Admissions:
"Student receiving university admission letter, happy expression, modern indoor setting"

c) Coaching:
"Students preparing for exams (IELTS/TOEFL), studying with books and laptop, focused atmosphere"

d) Counseling:
"One-on-one career counseling session, advisor guiding student, friendly and supportive environment"

  1. COUNTRIES SECTION

Generate images for each country:

  • USA:
    "Famous US university campus, diverse students walking, bright academic environment"

  • UK:
    "Historic university building (Oxford/Cambridge style), students in campus"

  • Canada:
    "Modern campus with snow or greenery, students with backpacks"

  • Australia:
    "University near beach or modern architecture, sunny environment"

  1. WHY CHOOSE US

"Confident student group celebrating success, graduation caps in air, global achievement feeling"

  1. TESTIMONIALS

"Happy international student smiling, holding documents or graduation certificate, authentic and natural expression"

  1. CALL TO ACTION

"Student ready to travel abroad, airport scene with luggage, airplane in background, hopeful expression"

🎯 FINAL OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS:

  • Images must be realistic and not overly staged

  • Maintain consistent lighting and tone across all images

  • Avoid watermarks, text overlays, or logos

  • Maintain brand feel: professional + global + aspirational

🔥 BONUS (VERY IMPORTANT)

Add this line at the end in Antigravity:

Ensure all images maintain consistent color grading with slight blue and gold tone to match brand identity.

💡 PRO TIP (Most People Ignore This)

👉 Don’t use:

  • Random Unsplash images ❌

  • Mixed styles ❌

👉 Do this:

  • Keep same lighting + tone across all images

  • That alone makes your site look 10x premium

If you want next:

  • I can map which exact image goes where in your current UI

  • Or give React code with image placement

  • Or generate actual images for you

Just tell 👍

🟦 1. HERO SECTION

File: hero.jpg
Where: Right side of hero / background

Prompt:

Aspiring international student looking at a globe or world map, working on laptop, modern desk, soft blue and gold lighting, global education theme, premium and inspirational mood, realistic photography

🟨 2. SERVICES SECTION

a) Visa Assistance

File: visa.jpg
Prompt:

Student discussing visa documents with consultant, passport and papers on table, professional office setting, natural lighting, realistic

b) Admissions

File: admissions.jpg
Prompt:

Happy student receiving university admission letter, smiling, modern indoor setting, soft lighting, realistic

c) Coaching

File: coaching.jpg
Prompt:

Students preparing for IELTS or exams, studying with books and laptop, focused environment, clean setup

d) Counseling

File: counseling.jpg
Prompt:

One-on-one student counseling session, advisor guiding student, friendly professional environment

🌍 3. COUNTRIES SECTION

🇺🇸 USA

File: usa.jpg
Prompt:

Modern American university campus, diverse students walking, bright academic environment, realistic

🇬🇧 UK

File: uk.jpg
Prompt:

Historic UK university campus (Oxford style), classic architecture, students walking, cloudy natural lighting

🇨🇦 Canada

File: canada.jpg
Prompt:

Canadian university campus with greenery or snow, students with backpacks, calm and clean environment

🇦🇺 Australia

File: australia.jpg
Prompt:

Australian university campus with modern buildings, sunny weather, vibrant student life

⭐ 4. WHY CHOOSE US

File: success.jpg
Prompt:

Group of students celebrating success, graduation caps in air, joyful expressions, global success feeling

💬 5. TESTIMONIALS

Testimonial 1

File: testimonial1.jpg
Prompt:

Happy international student smiling, holding documents or certificate, natural look

Testimonial 2

File: testimonial2.jpg
Prompt:

Confident student portrait, clean background, professional and friendly expression

✈️ 6. CALL TO ACTION

File: cta.jpg
Prompt:

Student at airport with luggage, airplane in background, ready to travel abroad, hopeful and excited mood

🔥 IMPORTANT (DON’T SKIP THIS)

Add this line to EVERY prompt:

consistent color grading with slight blue and gold tones, realistic photography, no text, no watermark

💡 HOW TO PLACE IN YOUR UI

  • Hero → Right side image or background

  • Services → Each card icon/image

  • Countries → Grid cards

  • Why Choose Us → Full-width or side image

  • Testimonials → Avatar/profile image

  • CTA → Background or side image

🚀 PRO TIP

Use:

  • Same brightness

  • Same tone

  • Same style

👉 This makes your website look like a premium brand, not random images
